description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to any branch. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8). For each Python version, check out the repository, set up Python with pip caching, install dependencies from requirements.txt and dev-requirements.txt, lint the code with flake8, and run tests with pytest.
